statement: In every magma, Equation 3175 (`x = (((y * y) * z) * w) * u`) implies Equation 4518 (`x * (y * z) = (x * w) * x`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0516
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op (op (op (op y y) z) w) u)) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, (op x (op y z)) = (op (op x w) x)
